item.title: Did You See That?
item.description: A surprising moment from farm life caught in real time, highlighting unexpected field conditions and quick reactions during daily work.

item.title: Can This Truck Run Again?
item.description: Laura Farms takes on an abandoned truck and checks whether it can be brought back to life.

item.description: Laura Farms works to get an old V8 engine running again.

item.title: A Day in the Corn Field
item.description: A full day of corn field work showing planting, maintenance, or harvest operations, highlighting modern farming practices and equipment use.

item.title: Abandoned Barn Dozer Find
item.description: Discovering an old dozer hidden in an abandoned barn, exploring its condition, restoration potential, and farm machinery history.

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Barn Dozer Find
media:content.media:description: Discovering an old dozer hidden in an abandoned barn, exploring its condition, restoration potential, and farm machinery history.

item.title: How I Use the Combine Harvester
item.description: A walkthrough of operating a combine harvester, covering controls, harvesting techniques, and efficient grain collection in the field.

item.title: Farming Like the Good Old Days
item.description: A look at traditional farming methods compared to modern agriculture, exploring how tools, labor, and efficiency have changed over time.

media:content.media:description: A look at traditional farming methods compared to modern agriculture, exploring how tools, labor, and efficiency have changed over time.

item.title: A Busy Day on the Farm
item.description: A large group working together on the farm, showing teamwork, coordination, and the scale of modern agricultural operations.
